programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: MV Becrux delivers 16,000 cattle, $12M cargo to Indonesia amid tight deadline, pirates, hazards.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Emma Maersk overcomes pirates, cyclones, Suez traffic to complete her mission successfully.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Mighty Ship Faust braves ice, storms, and stowaways to deliver thousands of luxury cars safely.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: The Yacht Express, a semi-submersible ship, transports luxury yachts across the Atlantic.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: In Canada, transporting a 360-tonne mining vehicle is key to protecting road infrastructure.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: Norwegian Joy, the fourth-largest cruise ship, faces logistical challenges traveling 50km to sea.

programme.desc: In an attempt to eliminate human error, airlines have increased the risk of flying

programme.title: Air Crash Confidential
programme.desc: Discover why a Jumbo Jet exploded mid-flight and DC10s fell from the sky due to fatal design errors in planes.

programme.title: Air Crash Confidential
programme.desc: New technologies can help prevent plane hijackers from gaining access, as planes are an ideal terrorist target

programme.title: As the Crow Flies
programme.desc: Follow a group of Royal Canadian Air Cadets in training to get their pilot's license in just seven weeks.

programme.title: Engineering The Future
programme.desc: Engineers are working on developing technology to harness the ocean's tides, using sub sea kites

programme.title: Engineering The Future
programme.desc: Innovators are exploring ways to harness the sun's vast energy potential, ensuring its continuous availability

programme.desc: CCGS Henry Larsen battles ice, storms, and rescues to aid isolated communities in Newfoundland.

programme.desc: Tregurtha's first mission of the season pushes ship and crew to the brink of exhaustion.

programme.desc: Emma Maersk completes mission despite pirates, cyclones, and Suez Canal traffic congestion.

programme.desc: The Antonov An 124-100M transports a valuable generator 11,000 km from England to South Korea.

programme.desc: Malmberget, Sweden, was relocated by Mammoet to Koskullskulle for safety from mine works.

programme.desc: Mega Transports, engineering marvels, carry 19,000 containers, requiring months of planning.

programme.desc: A father murdered an air traffic controller after 47 children died in a plane cras

programme.desc: The study explores the 1971 case of Juliane Koepcke, who survived a plane crash due to lightning
